text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: manu
Date: Sun Dec 13 11:53:58 UTC 2020

URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/557893

Log:
  sysutils/rpi-firmware: Update to 20201201

  Update to the latest firmware released.
  This should fix booting on the 8GB model and this also
  add dtb for the 400 and CM4 variant.

  PR:		251801

  head/sysutils/rpi-firmware/Makefile
  head/sysutils/rpi-firmware/distinfo
  head/sysutils/rpi-firmware/pkg-plist
